subject: Public Health
title: Global Health Justice
description: A quick, practical guide to Global Health Justice.

hook.text: Rich nations hoarded COVID vaccines while poor nations waited. That's global health injustice.

buildup.text: COVAX was created to distribute vaccines equitably—but wealthy countries bought directly, jumping the line.

discovery.text: Patent laws block poor nations from making cheap generic versions of life-saving drugs.

twist.text: India and South Africa pushed for a patent waiver at the WTO—it took two years just to agree in principle.

climax.text: Global health justice means the accident of birthplace shouldn't determine who lives and who dies.

punchline.text: A virus doesn't check your passport. Neither should a cure.

quiz.question: What was COVAX designed to do?
options: Distribute vaccines equitably to all nations
